roa.docketEntryComment: REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPT CHANGE OF PLEA(052022) EFILED

/CAL: TO SET TRIAL AND TO SET MANDATORY PRE TRIAL CONFERENCE/DAWT/CONTD:MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN S29/CONTD: TO SET TRIAL IN S22/
